verdict.answer_first: A states the core fix immediately: "The critical problem is the synchronous read"; B has a short preface before the same point.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to a concrete implementation with "Suggested rewrite" and cached async load; A surveys options and ends with "Want me to write the corrected version?"
